heading: Tonight
text: Any showers ending, and skies clearing out. Cooler, and less humid with some valley fog. Lows in the 50s to low 60s. Wind north near 10 mph, diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Becoming partly to mostly sunny. Highs from the upper 70s to mid 80s. Light north wind.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Mostly clear. Chance of river valley fog developing before dawn. Lows in the 50s, nearing 70 in the Champlain Valley. Calm wind.
